body.title: WorkflowC: diagnose-pattern reasoning workflow
body.result: WorkflowC_DiagnosePattern: hypothesis + discriminating test extraction. PatternDiagnosis output struct. 8 tests.
body.description: WorkflowC_DiagnosePattern — peer conversation to diagnose a recurring pattern (repeated failure, repeated escalation, repeated topic). Same pattern as WorkflowA. Opening: describe the pattern + instances. Workflow steps: hypothesize cause, propose discriminating test. Output: PatternDiagnosis(pattern, hypothesis, proposed_test). Sub-ticket of #436.
